name: claude-base
description: Reusable Claude Code plugin marketplace — generic skills, slash commands, sub-agents, and hooks. Use as a starting point or fork into project-specific marketplaces.

plugins.name: base-tools
plugins.description: Base plugin with generic skill, slash-command, sub-agent, and hook templates plus working hook examples (audit logger, secret-on-write guard, skill-activation telemetry).

plugins.name: mend
plugins.description: Mend (WhiteSource) SCA knowledge — REST v1.3 auth, project-token lookup, alert fetch, CVE severity. Reusable read layer.

plugins.name: dep-remediation
plugins.description: Fix vulnerable dependencies correctly — golden rule (direct/BOM not transitive), advisory cross-check, defer breaking majors, per-stack recipes (composer/gradle/maven) + local build+test.

plugins.name: jenkins
plugins.description: Blazemeter blazect Jenkins gate — trigger a multibranch build with PUSH_TO_GCR, gate on green, fix-forward, never gate on API_TESTS-CI.

plugins.name: github
plugins.description: Blazemeter GitHub branch/PR conventions — dated Docker-safe branch, commit+push via SSO gh, PR into the integration branch, tag PR title with the ticket id.

plugins.name: jira
plugins.description: Create/transition Blazemeter MOB Jira tickets — board 5348, Task, Product/Scrum-Team/Sprint fields, assignee = repo owner, status In Review.

plugins.name: mend-blz
plugins.description: End-to-end Mend remediation recipe — composes mend + dep-remediation + jenkins + github + jira into one loop (alerts → fix → Jenkins green → PR → Jira), registry-driven via services.json.
